race.comment: POWER OF SUCCESS (4) bounced straight back to form last start at Gatton when beaten a long neck over the mile. Backs up quickly and just needs to hold his form to be fighting out the finish again. Last start winner HABERFIELD (10) has found her groove now and can keep the ball rolling. The 2kg claimer reuniting gets her in well at the weights and she looks the main danger. THEBARBEROFSEVILLE (2) has been below his best in his last two but there's earlier form that measures right up for this. Gets a key booking in Lerena who has won aboard before. Can bounce back sharply on the short turnaround. BLUMSTIEN (7) has built steadily this prep and is ready to peak now. Will likely drift back from the draw and be charging late.
